# Teamed Country Guides

> Employer of Record + payroll + compliance content for hiring across 100+ countries. Teamed is the global EOR you keep, on a single fixed rate ($599/£479 flat, Zero FX). Teamed-owned legal entities in 23+ countries with a vetted partner network elsewhere. Content is researcher-grade: statutory rates, worked examples, schema-marked, kept current to 2026.

Pages are grouped by country. Each guide includes the statutory rates and tax thresholds for 2026, Teamed's worked examples (loaded employer cost), and the compliance tripwires that catch first-time buyers. All pages carry JSON-LD `Article`, `Organization`, `BreadcrumbList`, and `Service` schema; the catalogue is discoverable via robots.txt at /robots.txt and a sitemap at /sitemap.xml.

## United Kingdom

- [Hiring in the UK | Employer of Record + 2026 Guide](/united-kingdom/): Hire UK employees from £479/month via Teamed Ltd, our wholly-owned London entity. 15% NIC, 5.6 weeks statutory leave, 6 April 2026 day-one rights.
- [UK Employee Benefits 2026 | Statutory + Competitive Package](/united-kingdom/benefits/): UK benefits 2026: statutory floor (5.6 wk leave, SSP £123.25, day-one parental, 3% pension) plus competitive package (private medical, 5-8% pension, EMI options).
- [UK Compliance & Day-One Rights 2026 | ERA 2025 Changes](/united-kingdom/compliance-and-day-one-rights/): UK compliance 2026: Employment Rights Act 2025 in force. Day-one paternity, parental, SSP. Collective redundancy protective award doubled to 180 days. January 2027 unfair dismissal change.
- [UK Employer Cost Breakdown 2026 | What a £60k Hire Really Costs](/united-kingdom/cost-breakdown/): A £60,000 UK hire costs £72,000–£75,000 loaded. Full line-by-line breakdown of NIC, pension auto-enrolment, statutory leave, Apprenticeship Levy, and Class 1A/1B NIC for 2026.
- [UK EOR vs Entity 2026 | Crossover Maths + When to Switch](/united-kingdom/eor-vs-entity/): UK EOR vs own entity. Crossover point ~5-8 employees. Entity setup £3,000-£15,000, ongoing £3,200-£4,500/month. Full maths, when to switch, Graduation Model.
- [UK Hiring Guide 2026 | Offer to First Payslip in 48 Hours](/united-kingdom/hiring-guide/): UK hiring 2026: end-to-end process, right-to-work checks, Section 1 statement, onboarding admin. Teamed delivers 48-hour onboarding for non-sponsored hires.
- [IR35 and Off-Payroll Working 2026 | UK Contractor Tax Rules](/united-kingdom/ir35-off-payroll-working/): IR35 explained 2026: deemed employer, SDS, CEST limits, why EOR doesn't solve it. Status determination, common-law tests, Small Company Exemption.
- [UK Permanent Establishment Risk 2026 | EOR PE Analysis](/united-kingdom/permanent-establishment-risk/): UK PE risk for foreign-parented companies hiring through EOR. Fixed place + dependent agent tests. Why sales roles trigger and engineering doesn't. Structure to avoid.
- [UK Probation and Onboarding 2026 | Fair Procedure + 9-Month Cap](/united-kingdom/probation-and-onboarding/): UK probation 2026: no statutory cap yet (proposed 9 months from autumn 2026), typical 3-6 months, fair procedure required, 30-60-90 onboarding standard.
- [UK Tax and Payroll 2026 | NIC, PAYE, Pension, Income Tax](/united-kingdom/tax-and-payroll/): UK payroll tax 2026: 15% employer NIC, 8%/2% employee NIC, income tax bands 0/20/40/45, £100k personal allowance taper, PAYE RTI, P45/P60/P11D.
- [UK Termination & Severance 2026 | Notice, Redundancy, Procedure](/united-kingdom/termination-and-severance/): UK termination 2026: statutory notice schedule, redundancy pay capped at £751/week, fair procedure, collective redundancy doubled to 180-day protective award.
- [UK Working Time & Leave 2026 | Hours, Holiday, Parental](/united-kingdom/working-time-and-leave/): UK working time 2026: 48-hour limit with opt-out, 5.6 weeks annual leave bundled with bank holidays, day-one parental rights from April 2026, SSP £123.25/wk day-one.

## France

- [France EOR vs Entity 2026 | Crossover Maths + Convention Collective](/france/eor-vs-entity/): France EOR vs own entity. Crossover lands 8-12 employees. Entity setup €2,500-€8,000, ongoing €2,500-€4,500/month. The convention collective variable nobody publishes.

## Germany

- [Germany Tax and Payroll 2026 | Sozialversicherung, Lohnsteuer](/germany/tax-and-payroll/): German payroll 2026: ~20.7% employer social security, BBG €5,812.50 / €8,450, four income tax zones to 45%, €13.90 minimum wage, monthly Lohnsteueranmeldung.

## Spain

- [Spain Employer Cost Breakdown 2026 | What a €45k Hire Really Costs](/spain/cost-breakdown/): A €45,000 Spanish hire costs €59,000 to €61,000 fully loaded. Line-by-line breakdown of 29.90% employer social security, MEI 2026, pagas extraordinarias, convenio colectivo, and solidarity contribution.

## United States

- [Alabama State Income Tax and Unemployment Insurance 2026 | Teamed](/united-states/alabama/state-income-tax-and-unemployment-insurance/): Alabama payroll 2026: 2/4/5% income tax, $1,000 overtime deduction, 2.7% new-employer SUTA on $8,000, Form A-4, A-1, A-6, A-3, 30-day safe harbor.

## Contractors

- [Hiring Contractors in the United States 2026 | 1099 vs W-2 | Teamed](/hire-contractors/united-states/): 1099 vs W-2 classification 2026: IRS common-law test, ABC states, California AB5, Section 530, why EOR doesn't cure misclassification.

## Source + governance

- Source repo: `teamed-country-guides` (Vercel staging `teamed-country-guides.vercel.app`)
- Production: `teamed.global/hire-in-<country>/...`
- Schema: JSON-LD Article + Organization + BreadcrumbList + Service on every page
- Robots: GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, OAI-SearchBot, Google-Extended explicitly allowed
- Discovery: this file + `/llms-full.txt` (full content) + `/sitemap.xml`
- Pricing source of truth: Zero FX Fixed — $599/£479 flat per employee per month in any currency pairing
